# PHIL.030 ? Mohism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** mohism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Universal love (impartial caring); utilitarian ethics; meritocracy; anti-fatalism; pragmatic logic; frugality

## Application
Care equally for all; evaluate by consequences; promote capability over birth; reject fatalism; use resources efficiently; logical clarity

## Key Values
- Universal love
- Consequentialism
- Meritocracy
- Practical benefit
